title: 10 Pieces Ceiling Hooks - 2 Inch White Cup Hooks Metal Ceiling Screw-in Hooks with PVC Plastic Vinyl Coating Multipurpose Utility Hooks for Home and Office
features: Premium Material: Ceiling Hooks are made of sturdy metal with non-slip PVC plastic vinyl coating, robust and anti-rust, can be used for a long time under various climatic conditions indoors and outdoors.
Practical Design: The open opening makes it very convenient to take out items, can even be operated with one hand, PVC coating designed to increase grip of item hung and protect item being hung.

Easy to Use: Spiral special thread make pointed end make cup hooks easier to screw into drywall, wood or other surfaces, no fancy machinery, just push and twist to screw in, has great load-bearing capacity and not easy to deform.
Wide Application: Screw-in hooks can be used for hanging mug, plant, umbrellas, keys, lamp, curtain, hat, clothes, festival decoration, etc., save space in your home, school or office.
Size and Package: Pack includes 10 Pieces 2 Inch Cup hooks. Cup hook length: 2 inch/5.08 cm, screw length: 0.83 inch/2.1 cm, can be widely used in all aspects of life, enough for your daily needs.
